message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue">
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Product Discovery: Research GTD and define product scope","description":"Research David Allen's Getting Things Done methodology thoroughly and define the product scope for evolving our simple todo list into a GTD system.

Deliverables:
1. GTD methodology summary (key concepts: Inbox/Capture, Clarify/Process, Organize, Reflect/Review, Engage)
2. User problem statement for GTD users
3. Domain concepts map (Inbox items, Next Actions, Projects, Contexts, Waiting For, Someday/Maybe, Reference, Calendar, Weekly Review)
4. Prioritized feature list for v1 (must-have vs should-have vs could-have vs future)
5. Updated PROJECT.md with new scope
6. Success criteria for v1
7. Key architectural considerations for the team

Marty Cagan drives this task. All 9 team members contribute perspectives during discovery.","assignedBy":"marty-cagan","timestamp":"2026-02-11T18:31:33.974Z"}
</teammate-message>

content.text: That's just the task assignment notification echoing back to me. I've already completed all 7 deliverables listed there. I'm waiting for the reviewers to read the documents and send me their feedback. Nothing to do until their messages arrive.
